Error: The file you provided appears to be an e-Way Bill generated by Rabbit Agency in Kerala, India.

Cause: This is not a file in the traditional sense, but rather a digital document or receipt, which is used for the electronic way bill system in India.

Fix:
1. To view the contents of this document, you will need a software or application that is capable of reading the e-Way Bill format.
2. Alternatively, you can use a web-based interface provided by the Indian government to view and download the e-Way Bill.
